summary: Community level 0. Sources: ASAMKnowledgeDB. Standards: ASAM. Label mix: Table:1956, Concept:14, Standard:1. Representative nodes: ASAM, ASAM, XCP, MDF, ODX, UDS, ECU, DAQ. Key details: Association for Standardization of Automation and Measuring Systems. German-based international standards body for automotive development tools. Publishes standards for ECU measurement (XCP), data logging (MDF), diagnostics (ODX/UDS), and tool automation (ASAP3/MCD-3). | Universal Measurement and Calibration Protocol (ASAM MCD-1 XCP). Master-slave protocol for ECU development. The measurement tool (master) connects to the ECU (slave) to read/write calibration parameters, acquire measurement data (DAQ), and flash-program firmware. Commands use hex codes in range 0xC0-0xFF. Transport layers: CAN, Ethernet, USB, FlexRay. | Measurement Data Format (ASAM MDF V4.x). Binary file format for storing time-series measurement data from ECU testing. Block-based structure where each block starts with a 4-char ID (##HD=Header, ##DG=DataGroup, ##CG=ChannelGroup, ##CN=Channel, ##CC=Conversion). Supports multiple signal groups, compressed data, and attachments.

properties.name: community_c7d9d467
properties.summary: Community level 0. Sources: ASAMKnowledgeDB. Standards: ASAM. Label mix: Table:1956, Concept:14, Standard:1. Representative nodes: ASAM, ASAM, XCP, MDF, ODX, UDS, ECU, DAQ. Key details: Association for Standardization of Automation and Measuring Systems. German-based international standards body for automotive development tools. Publishes standards for ECU measurement (XCP), data logging (MDF), diagnostics (ODX/UDS), and tool automation (ASAP3/MCD-3). | Universal Measurement and Calibration Protocol (ASAM MCD-1 XCP). Master-slave protocol for ECU development. The measurement tool (master) connects to the ECU (slave) to read/write calibration parameters, acquire measurement data (DAQ), and flash-program firmware. Commands use hex codes in range 0xC0-0xFF. Transport layers: CAN, Ethernet, USB, FlexRay. | Measurement Data Format (ASAM MDF V4.x). Binary file format for storing time-series measurement data from ECU testing. Block-based structure where each block starts with a 4-char ID (##HD=Header, ##DG=DataGroup, ##CG=ChannelGroup, ##CN=Channel, ##CC=Conversion). Supports multiple signal groups, compressed data, and attachments.
